dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes a reversal setup within an uptrend: (1) previous close above MA confirms uptrend context; (2) high makes new n-day high (mapped to Donchian upper band as proxy for highest(high[1],n)); (3) low penetrates below previous low indicating rejection; (4) close below previous close confirms reversal bar. Exit on close above previous close (reversal of reversal). Parameter 'n' mapped to Donchian 20-period lookback. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP as signal occurs within uptrends.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal describes a reversal setup within an uptrend: (1) previous close above MA confirms uptrend context; (2) high makes new n-day high (mapped to Donchian upper band as proxy for highest(high[1],n)); (3) low penetrates below previous low indicating rejection; (4) close below previous close confirms reversal bar. Exit on close above previous close (reversal of reversal). Parameter 'n' mapped to Donchian 20-period lookback. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP as signal occurs within uptrends.

source_rule_text: Enter a short position when price closes below the previous close after making a new n-day high within an uptrend, with the low penetrating below the previous low.
